hero.title: Redefine Your Media.
hero.subtitle: High-performance, cross-platform utility designed to acquire and manage digital media effortlessly.
features.title: Features
features.format.title: Wild-format converter
features.format.body: Fast conversion from unknown formats into everyday standards.
features.discord.title: 10 MB Discord compressor
features.discord.body: Shrink videos and audios to hit Discord friendly limits with no effort.
features.downloader.title: Smart downloader
features.downloader.body: Download media from over 1,700 available sites.
features.installs.title: No extra installs
features.installs.body: Everything is installed and updated in the app. No external installation requirements.
features.queue.title: Advanced queue system
features.queue.body: Queue a lot of files and let Pulsar process everything automatically.
features.presets.title: Clean presets
features.presets.body: Save your favorite formats and compression targets in one click.
showcase.title: Showcase
showcase.subtitle: A quick look at what Pulsar delivers in practice.
showcase.shot1.caption: Clean dashboard with live progress.
showcase.shot2.caption: Batch queue with smart presets.
showcase.shot3.caption: Downloader view with auto naming.
showcase.shot4.caption: Compression summary and export.
source.title: Source
source.body: Pulsar is and will always be open-source and ad-free. Feel free to explore the code, report bugs, and contribute to help us develop Pulsar.
faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Short answers for the most common Pulsar questions.
faq.a1: Pulsar is an application that allows for a simple downloading, converting and compressing process locally on your computer.
faq.a2: Pulsar is for those who want to work and download various media formats quickly and easily. It's perfect for editors, creators, gamers, or just the average user.
faq.a3: Of course! Pulsar is and always will be free and without ads or premium features.
faq.q4: The program on macOS shows as corrupted!
faq.a4: It is caused by unsigned software. To fix this, click Cancel, then go to Settings - Privacy & Security, scroll down, and click Open Anyway.
faq.q5: What language is Pulsar written in?
faq.a5: Pulsar is written in modern Tauri v2, which uses Rust and HTML/CSS/JS.
support.title: Support
support.body: Creating a tool like this takes a tremendous amount of time. If you'd like to support the project financially and receive perks like early builds, teasers, and inclusion in this section of the website, you can support us on Patreon.
download.title: Download
download.infoHtml:
Windows: If the system blocks the file, click More info → Run anyway.
macOS: If system says that file is damaged or undefined developer, click Cancel, then go to Settings → Privacy & Security, scroll down and click Open Anyway.
download.footerPrefix: If you would like to see archived versions of Pulsar or download the
